visual_description: In a dimly lit room, two men in white shirts sit side‑by‑side at a desk wearing headsets, while a man in a dark suit stands before them. One of the seated men looks toward a screen, and the other leans toward a microphone, holding it close to his mouth. The view shifts to a close‑up of the suited man’s face, then to the seated man speaking into the microphone.
audio_description: A quiet voice speaks into a microphone with faint background sounds.
